summary: Viewing Scheduler UI Feature - Complete Testing. All backend APIs working (12/12 tests passed). Frontend UI flow fully tested: Schedule Viewing button appears on both rent and sale listings, ViewingScheduler modal opens with date/time selection, confirmation step, and success screen. Calendar page shows scheduled viewings correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with scheduler_test@dommma.com successful
Backend: GET /api/calendar/events/{user_id} returns events array
Backend: POST /api/calendar/events creates calendar event
Backend: Event persistence verified via GET after POST
Backend: DELETE /api/calendar/events/{event_id} cancels event
Backend: GET /api/calendar/google/status/{user_id} returns connected status
Backend: GET /api/calendar/google/auth-url generates valid Google OAuth URL
Backend: DELETE /api/calendar/google/disconnect/{user_id} works
Backend: GET /api/listings?listing_type=rent returns rental listings
Backend: GET /api/listings?listing_type=sale returns sale listings
Backend: POST /api/calendar/viewing schedules property viewing
Backend: Test cleanup removes TEST_ prefixed events
Frontend: Schedule Viewing button visible on rental listing modal
Frontend: Schedule Viewing button visible on sale listing modal
Frontend: Clicking Schedule Viewing without login redirects to /login
Frontend: ViewingScheduler modal opens after login and clicking Schedule Viewing
Frontend: Date selection shows 12 dates (next 14 days excluding Sundays)
Frontend: Time selection shows 18 slots (9am-6pm in 30min intervals)
Frontend: Confirmation step shows date, time, and notes input
Frontend: Confirm Viewing button creates event successfully
Frontend: Success screen shows with Done and View Calendar buttons
Frontend: Calendar page shows scheduled viewing in Upcoming Events
Frontend: Connect Google Calendar button visible on Calendar page
Frontend: New Event button visible on Calendar page
critical_code_review_comments: ViewingScheduler component correctly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Calendar service properly creates events with all required fields
Google Calendar OAuth integration uses real credentials from env vars
Local calendar events work independently of Google Calendar connection
Event sync to Google Calendar optional (only when connected)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 tested the new Viewing Scheduler feature. Key components: 1) ViewingScheduler.jsx modal component with 4 steps (date, time, confirm, success). 2) Schedule Viewing button in Browse.jsx listing modal for both rent and sale listings. 3) CalendarPage.jsx shows scheduled viewings and handles Google OAuth callback. 4) Backend /api/calendar/* endpoints for event CRUD and Google Calendar integration. All features working correctly.

mocked_services.google_calendar_actual_sync: Google OAuth generates valid URL but actual calendar sync requires user consent - Integration REAL but requires manual OAuth flow

Google_Calendar_Integration.notes: OAuth URL generation working, actual Google sync requires user consent
